roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/CONT/X: THE DEFENDANT IS ORDERED PRESENT,UNLESS DEFENSE COUNSEL HAS AUTHORITY TO ACCEPT RESTITUTION AMOUNT ON HIS CLIENT'S BEHALF,

/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REMAIN ON SURETY BOND//X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITHSCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:THE 01-14-19 HEARING IS CONFIRMED/DOP/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 01-25-19 (60TH)/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A SCRAM DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY CLOSEOF BUSINESS TODAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:ATTEND AA MEETINGS 2XPER WEEK/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE & PROOF OF SCRAM/DOP/
